title: Peer Allowlist
description: Per-installation LRU ring buffer of known peers (friends + recent contacts). Backs the `trustLevel` badge in screen `64-network-lobby` and the `Add to friends` / `Remove from friends` per-row actions. Persisted in IndexedDB `hr-profile.knownPeers` per `data-inventory.md`; wiped by `WIPE_LOCAL_DATA scope=profile|all`. Writes require `state.profile.consent.multiplayer.state === 'granted'`. See `docs/architecture/peer-trust.md`.

peerId.description: Stable peer identifier; in M5 derived from the long-lived peer key per `peer-identity.md`.

displayNameAtAdd.description: Best-effort label captured at the moment of allowlist add. Display-name validation per `display-name-policy.md`. Never used for handshake; the peer key is authoritative.

lastSeenAt.description: Refreshed on every successful WebRTC handshake via `RECORD_PEER_CONTACT`.

tier.description: `friend` = explicit allowlist add; `recent` = seen within the last 30 days but never explicitly allowlisted. The `trustLevel` selector derives `unknown` for any peer not in this list.
